title: senecio cotyledonis
intro: Senecio cotyledonis, also known as Deadnettle or Wormwood, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to induce sweating, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Senecio cotyledonis include its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
